title: explicit cast should not be required

features.name: ternary operator assignment to enum variable
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator assignment where the result is assigned to an enumerated type variable, which should not require an explicit cast
features.snippet:
enum { A, B, C } e;
assign e = (cond ? A : B);

features.name: enum variable assignment via if-else versus ternary
features.description: Code should include both an if-else and an equivalent ternary operator assignment to the same enumerated type variable, where if-else works but ternary requires explicit cast

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance
